message:
feat(engine): resolve all parser and lowering gap placeholders

All six gap sites (binary non-arithmetic, non-identifier assignment,
for-in, for-of, new-expression, template-literal) are now marked
Resolved with accurate IR shape and divergence descriptions reflecting
the implemented lowering paths. Zero open placeholders and zero
fail-closed sites remain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
